org.praxisplatform.uischema.schema.CanonicalSchemaRef

Package
Description
org.praxisplatform.uischema.action
Discovery semantico de workflow actions e avaliacao contextual de disponibilidade.
org.praxisplatform.uischema.schema
Referencias canonicas de schema estrutural resolvidas por /schemas/filtered.
org.praxisplatform.uischema.surface
Discovery semantico de surfaces e avaliacao contextual de disponibilidade.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.requestSchema(String path, String method)
    Atalho para resolver o schema de request de path + method.
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.requestSchema(CanonicalOperationRef operationRef)
    Atalho para resolver o schema de request de uma operacao canonica.
    CanonicalSchemaRef
    FilteredSchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(String path, String method, String schemaType, boolean includeInternalSchemas, String tenant, Locale locale, String idField, Boolean readOnly)
     
    CanonicalSchemaRef
    FilteredSchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(CanonicalOperationRef operationRef, String schemaType)
     
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(String path, String method, String schemaType)
    Variante minima para resolver uma referencia canonica sem dimensoes adicionais.
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(String path, String method, String schemaType, boolean includeInternalSchemas, String tenant, Locale locale)
    Variante reduzida que preserva apenas as dimensoes canonicas atualmente estruturais.
    CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(String path, String method, String schemaType, boolean includeInternalSchemas, String tenant, Locale locale, String idField, Boolean readOnly)
    Resolve a referencia canonica completa para o schema filtrado.
    CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.resolve(CanonicalOperationRef operationRef, String schemaType)
    Resolve a referencia canonica de schema a partir de uma operacao previamente resolvida.
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.responseSchema(String path, String method)
    Atalho para resolver o schema de response de path + method.
    default CanonicalSchemaRef
    SchemaReferenceResolver.responseSchema(CanonicalOperationRef operationRef)
    Atalho para resolver o schema de response de uma operacao canonica.
